T^T. ^t. ^ . TO.] am. %. "u^rr, am ^ m MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) ORDER New Delhi, the 19th March, 1997 G. S. R. 154 (E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (i) of Section 3 of the Prevention of Illicit traffic in Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Act, 1988 (46 of 1988), the Central Government hereby specially empowers Smt. Reva Nayyar, Joint Secretary to the Government of India, for the purpose of the said Act. [F. No. 820/12/96-PITNDPS] R.K. GUPTAN, Under Secy. 691GI/97 Printed by the Manager, Govt, of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Dclhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054— 1997. -- 1 of 1 --
